message:
style(raptorq): replace pointer 'as' casts with .cast::<T>() in AVX2 SIMD paths

Replaced 10 occurrences of `ptr as *const __m128i` / `ptr as *const
__m256i` / `ptr as *mut __m256i` with the equivalent `.cast::<T>()`
calls in gf256_mul_slice and gf256_addmul_slice AVX2 implementations.

The .cast() method is preferred over 'as' casts for raw pointer type
conversions because it cannot accidentally change pointer mutability
(const↔mut), making the intent clearer in unsafe SIMD code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
